name: cogniva-dev
description: Cogniva's development toolkit: architectural decision documentation (auto-doc), deferred work capture (backlog), repo scaffolding (repo-init, add-module), the feature lifecycle (plan-feature, execute-feature, quick-fix, complete-feature) with isolated-worktree execution, on-demand worktree cleanup (sweep-worktrees), and read-only status roll-ups (feature-status, module-status, repo-status).
